positive: A majestic and symmetrical arrangement of bioluminescent jungle flora and celestial elements. Focus on large, stylized monstera leaves and fern fronds interwoven with abstract constellations and nebula dust. The composition must be highly central and suitable for textile printing, featuring strong black silhouettes against a vibrant, saturated gradient of deep indigo, emerald green, and electric cyan. The style is intricate, modern botanical psychedelia, rendered with sharp linework and extreme contrast. Volumetric lighting emphasizes clean edges and deep shadow play, creating a dreamlike yet graphic print. Intricate detail, maximalist composition, apparel art, high resolution, symmetry.
